headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on Simon Property Group, Raises Price Target to $285
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Alexander Goldfarb   maintains Simon Property Group (NYSE:SPG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $230 to $285.
